summary: No GitHub mutations are planned. The hydrated artifact shows no security-sensitive refs, but the cluster has two useful open contributor PRs for the same cron announce reasoning leak. #40534 is the representative PR, while #73363 is newer, directly linked to #73186, and has recent Feishu picker coverage. ClawSweeper explicitly asks maintainer review to reconcile #73363 with the broader #40534 scope and the reasoning-only fallback policy, so canonical selection is not high-confidence.

actions.reason: Representative PR is useful but not safely canonical without maintainer choice against the newer overlapping #73363 path.
Keep the issue open as related evidence for the active PR selection; closeout is blocked until a canonical fix path is chosen and validated.
Useful overlapping PR, but canonical selection and reasoning-only fallback policy require maintainer judgment; failing checks also block any fixed-by-candidate closeout.

needs_human: Choose the canonical implementation path between #40534 and #73363. #40534 is the representative and broader strict path, while #73363 is newer, linked to #73186, and includes recent Feishu picker coverage.
Decide the cron announce policy for reasoning-only payloads: never deliver reasoning payload text, or allow a conservative fallback when no non-reasoning content exists.
